title: AI Coding Workflow Stack
summary: Published 88CN projects that help software teams review or improve code workflows using public signals.
inclusionCriteria: The cluster must be backed by at least one reviewed local 88CN project with published status and public source links. Non-published records are excluded.
whyIncluded: Aurora Code is already a published local project with public source links and an AI code review workflow. The page does not infer extra metrics or external repository data.
methodologyNote: Tech stack clusters are finite editorial route groups. They are generated only from this allowlist and published-only local project records, not from a crawler, external data repository, or runtime tag expansion.
